title: Bending Styles
description: This mod allows you to use the elemental bending powers from Avatar the last Airbender.
body:
Description
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GKOJNmfFf60 

sub pls for news and support.

This mod gives the player the ability to use all four elements from avatar the last airbender, wich are fire, air, earth and water. The player can activate specific abilities by pressing different key combinations. Kinda like how different moves are activated in mortal combat like games. 

How to get started with the mod:  

The player does not start off with all the elemental powers. To get one of the elements you will need to create and read first a normal scroll and then buy and read one of the elemental scrolls. 
![The crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/451779df617416d509f347526fd31fa76cbb9964.png)
  

The crafting recipie of a scroll. It uses 7 ancient lore pieces wich you can obtain by (right now) either slaying a gargoyle from a fire temple or completing a parkour thing in the air islands. Once you have the scroll simply right click while holding it in your right arm, that will open the scroll and give you the advancement Bender. When you have this advancement your character will pose whenever you press the keys (changable in the settings) R, G or V. 

Then you will need to get a librarian villager and trade with him for a scroll of one of the specific elements. ![an example of a trade.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/352feb2a56d9ad1c4c874ae21cdffe6273aaf2e2.png) <---- The trade for a fire scroll. 

Once you get the new scroll just simply open it like the scroll before and you´ll get the element. 

All Fire abilities:

R, G, R -----> FirePunch: Shoots out a bunch of fire

G, V ----> FireJump: Boosts you into the air while burning the ground.

G, R, R -----> FireCircle: Shoots fire around you forming a circle.

R, G, V, R(holding) ----> FireBreath: Like a flamethrower.

V, G, R -----> Firewall: Lits the ground.

G, V, (after Firejump) -----> FireJet: Hovering.

 

All Air abilities:

R, V -----> AirJump: Propeles you upwards (forwards with elytras).

R, G, G -----> AirSlice: Shoots a blade of air that can go through targets.

G, R, G ------> WindGust: Shoots a large cloud of wind that pushes the target.

V, R, G(holding) -----> That ball thing Aang liked doing: You ride a ball of air.

 

All Earth abilities:

R, V, G -----> EarthingUp: Creates two blocks of the specific earth block you are looking at in the direction of the face of the block you are looking at. 

G, R, V ----> EarthKick: Breaks the earh block you are looking at and shoots out a projectile of that earth block. The damage depends on the hardness of the block.

G, V, V ----> EarthPillar: Lifts you up and creates a pillar underneath you.

R, G, V, G -----> EarthWall: uses the earth blocks in front of you to create a wall.

R, G, V, V ------> Digging: Destroys earth blocks infront of you.

 

All Water abilities:

G, V, R ----> PickUp: Picks up water and holds it infront of you. (Can be used on ice or if you have a waterbucket.)

G (after PickUp) ----> Splash: Shoots the water or ice you are holding.

V (after PickUp) -----> Freeze: Freezes the water you are holding. 

R, V (after PickUp) -----> WaterShield: Creates a bubble of water around you. 

R (after PickUp and Freeze) ----> Sniper: Shoots a single strong shot that can deal a lot of damage.

V(after PickUp and Freeze) ----> BigFreeze: Shoots ice that can deal heavy freeze damage and create blocks of ice.
